---
title: "HMPV Illness Severity and Co-detections: NVSN 2015–2026"
subtitle: "Replication of Amarin et al. (2026) Framework Applied to HMPV"
author: "Ray Pomponio / Anna Wang-Erickson"
date: today
output-file: "Replication Analysis May 2026.html"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    df-print: paged
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
fig-cap-location: top
---
